scripts.gen:ts-fetch:docker: docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/local openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o /local/gen/ts-fetch --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-axios:docker: docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/local openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-axios -o /local/gen/ts-axios --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-fetch:docker:win: docker run --rm -v %cd%:/local openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o /local/gen/ts-fetch --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-axios:docker:win: docker run --rm -v %cd%:/local openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-axios -o /local/gen/ts-axios --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-fetch:npx: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o gen/ts-fetch --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-axios:npx: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-axios -o gen/ts-axios --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
scripts.gen:ts-fetch:node-http: node src/server.js & node node_modules/@openapitools/openapi-generator-cli/main.js generate -i http://127.0.0.1:3000/v1/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o gen/ts-fetch --additional-properties supportsES6=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,withoutPrefixEnums=true
